description: Perform a security header compliance audit for https://crawler-test.com/. Export the security audit data for all crawled URLs to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/security_audit.csv. Create a summary report at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/security_headers_summary.txt that includes the total number of URLs crawled, the count of URLs missing 'X-Frame-Options', the count of URLs missing 'X-Content-Type-Options', and a statement on whether HSTS is enforced (Yes/No).
